title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (during Update all)
scenario: During a 1-step DFU "Update All" process, when the charge case is being updated and both earbuds are placed into the charge case, the app shows a Houston screen instead of the expected behavior.
steps: While the charge case is being updated, place both earbuds into the charge case
Observe the screen displayed in the app
expected: The app should show the appropriate DFU update progress screen
